mapper.update: UPDATE inventory SET stock = stock - #{quantity}, locked_stock = locked_stock + #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND stock >= #{quantity} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE inventory SET stock = stock + #{quantity}, locked_stock = locked_stock - #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND locked_stock >= #{quantity} AND is_deleted = 0
